topic: 勇敢的小兔去森林探险
script:
薄荷绿连帽短外套的小兔蹦蹦，长耳微翘，手插兜，狡黠一笑：“我去森林探险，看看有没有秘密！”他背上小水壶，尾巴绒球一抖就出发了。

进了森林，松果滚到脚边，蹦蹦用门牙轻轻一顶：“嘿，像保龄球！”突然“咔嚓”一声，前面的小木桥断了两块。蹦蹦大圆眼一亮，眉毛上挑：“难不倒我！”他把树枝摆成小阶梯，又找来藤蔓当扶手，小心迈过去。

刚过桥，听见“呜呜”声——原来小松鼠被藤蔓缠住了。蹦蹦放下手，认真地用小树枝挑开结：“别急，深呼吸。”松鼠得救了，送他一颗亮亮的橡果当“勇敢勋章”。

回家路上，蹦蹦摸摸粉鼻头笑了：“勇敢不是瞎闯，是会想办法，还会帮忙。”

pages.prompt:
儿童绘本封面，主题：勇敢的小兔去森林探险

pages.text: 家门口/小路边，薄荷绿连帽短外套的小兔蹦蹦长耳微翘，双手插兜，狡黠一笑对观众说：“我去森林探险，看看有没有秘密！”随后把小水壶背到身上，尾巴绒球一抖，转身出发。
pages.prompt:
Anthropomorphic little rabbit (age 6-8), small agile body, long ears slightly upturned, fluffy pom-pom tail, big round eyes with catchlights, pink nose, slightly visible buck teeth, light blush cheeks; wearing mint-green hooded short jacket, creamy white T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, small water canteen on back. He stands at the path near home, hands in pockets with a mischievous grin, speaks to camera, then straps the canteen and starts walking, tail wiggles. Bright soft daylight, cheerful urban cartoon 3D with realistic fur (not scary), clean colors, shallow depth of field, 4k, cinematic lighting, medium shot, smooth dolly-in then gentle lateral follow, masterpiece.

pages.shotDescription: 家门口/小路边，薄荷绿连帽短外套的小兔蹦蹦长耳微翘，双手插兜，狡黠一笑对观众说：“我去森林探险，看看有没有秘密！”随后把小水壶背到身上，尾巴绒球一抖，转身出发。

pages.text: 森林入口处到林间小道，蹦蹦小跑进入森林，脚边一颗松果滚来。他停下，俯身用门牙轻轻一顶松果，像在推保龄球一样让松果向前滚，嘴里轻快地说：“嘿，像保龄球！”
pages.prompt:
Wide shot in a sunny forest trail. Same anthropomorphic rabbit boy (6-8) with mint-green hoodie jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen on back; big round eyes, pink nose, buck teeth slightly visible, blush cheeks, long ears slightly upturned. A pinecone rolls to his feet; he crouches and gently nudges it forward with his front teeth like bowling, saying a playful line. Low-angle tracking following the rolling pinecone then framing the rabbit, bright soft light through trees, vivid colors, urban cartoon 3D realistic fur style, 4k, cinematic lighting, smooth gimbal movement, masterpiece.

pages.shotDescription: 森林入口处到林间小道，蹦蹦小跑进入森林，脚边一颗松果滚来。他停下，俯身用门牙轻轻一顶松果，像在推保龄球一样让松果向前滚，嘴里轻快地说：“嘿，像保龄球！”

pages.text: 前方小木桥处，“咔嚓”一声，桥板断了两块。蹦蹦停在断口前，大圆眼一亮、眉毛上挑，露出门牙自信一笑：“难不倒我！”他迅速把树枝摆成小阶梯，伸手试稳，准备过桥。
pages.prompt:

The same rabbit child hero: mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen; big round eyes with highlights, pink nose, slight buck teeth, blush cheeks, long ears slightly upturned. He reacts to a 'crack' sound, eyebrows raised, confident mischievous grin, says 'Nothing can stop me!' then quickly arranges sticks into small steps, testing stability with his paw. Bright soft daylight, clean urban cartoon 3D realistic fur, 4k, cinematic lighting, fast dolly-in to face then tilt down to obstacle, masterpiece.

pages.text: 过桥动作镜头：蹦蹦用藤蔓当扶手，一手握藤蔓，一脚一脚踩着树枝阶梯，小心翼翼跨过断桥到对岸，耳朵微动、神情专注，落地后松一口气。
pages.prompt:
Wide side view of the broken wooden bridge in a bright forest. Same anthropomorphic rabbit boy (6-8) with mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen. He uses a vine as a handrail, carefully steps across stick-made stairs over the gap, focused expression, ears subtly twitch, then reaches the other side and exhales in relief. Smooth lateral tracking (side dolly), natural soft sunbeams, colorful urban cartoon 3D realistic fur look, 4k, cinematic lighting, stable composition, masterpiece.

pages.shotDescription: 过桥动作镜头：蹦蹦用藤蔓当扶手，一手握藤蔓，一脚一脚踩着树枝阶梯，小心翼翼跨过断桥到对岸，耳朵微动、神情专注，落地后松一口气。

pages.text: 对岸林间，传来“呜呜”声。蹦蹦循声走近，发现藤蔓把一只小松鼠缠住。蹦蹦立刻放下手里东西，神情认真，用小树枝细心挑开藤蔓结，一边安慰：“别急，深呼吸。”松鼠被解开后把一颗亮亮的橡果递给蹦蹦当“勇敢勋章”。
pages.prompt:
Medium shot in a sunny forest clearing. Same rabbit child hero (anthropomorphic, 6-8): mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen; big round eyes, pink nose, slight buck teeth, blush cheeks, long ears slightly upturned. He hears a soft whimper, leans in with a serious caring face, uses a small twig to carefully loosen a vine knot (gentle, non-scary), speaking calmly 'Don’t panic, take a deep breath.' After freeing, a small squirrel (friendly, cute) offers a shiny acorn medal to the rabbit; the rabbit receives it with warm focus. Slow dolly-in, bright soft lighting, urban cartoon 3D realistic fur, 4k, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, masterpiece.

shots.cameraMovement: 侧向平移跟随他跨越断桥
shots.videoPrompt: Wide side view of the broken wooden bridge in a bright forest. Same anthropomorphic rabbit boy (6-8) with mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen. He uses a vine as a handrail, carefully steps across stick-made stairs over the gap, focused expression, ears subtly twitch, then reaches the other side and exhales in relief. Smooth lateral tracking (side dolly), natural soft sunbeams, colorful urban cartoon 3D realistic fur look, 4k, cinematic lighting, stable composition, masterpiece.

shots.description: 对岸林间，传来“呜呜”声。蹦蹦循声走近，发现藤蔓把一只小松鼠缠住。蹦蹦立刻放下手里东西，神情认真，用小树枝细心挑开藤蔓结，一边安慰：“别急，深呼吸。”松鼠被解开后把一颗亮亮的橡果递给蹦蹦当“勇敢勋章”。
shots.cameraMovement: 缓慢推近强调解结与递橡果动作
shots.videoPrompt: Medium shot in a sunny forest clearing. Same rabbit child hero (anthropomorphic, 6-8): mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen; big round eyes, pink nose, slight buck teeth, blush cheeks, long ears slightly upturned. He hears a soft whimper, leans in with a serious caring face, uses a small twig to carefully loosen a vine knot (gentle, non-scary), speaking calmly 'Don’t panic, take a deep breath.' After freeing, a small squirrel (friendly, cute) offers a shiny acorn medal to the rabbit; the rabbit receives it with warm focus. Slow dolly-in, bright soft lighting, urban cartoon 3D realistic fur, 4k, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, masterpiece.

shots.description: 回家路上/夕阳暖光的林间小道，蹦蹦一边走一边把亮亮的橡果举在胸前看，另一只手摸摸粉鼻头，露出满足的笑，对观众总结：“勇敢不是瞎闯，是会想办法，还会帮忙。”他继续轻快前行。
shots.cameraMovement: 轻柔推近并微微跟随前进
shots.videoPrompt: Close-up moving shot on a forest path with warm late-afternoon golden light. Same anthropomorphic rabbit boy (6-8), small agile, long ears slightly upturned, fluffy pom-pom tail (hinted), big round eyes with catchlights, pink nose, slight buck teeth, blush cheeks; mint-green hooded short jacket, cream T-shirt, orange-yellow shorts, sneakers, canteen. He walks forward, holds a shiny acorn at chest level, gently taps/rubs his pink nose with the other paw, smiles and speaks a reflective line about bravery. Soft dolly-in with subtle forward follow, golden-hour soft glow, urban cartoon 3D realistic fur, 4k, cinematic lighting, clean background bokeh, masterpiece.
